listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 Size, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3UpdateIpi

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_Sha3Update64Bit or XSecure_Sha3Finish based on the Continue bit in the command.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the input data on which hash has to be calculated
Higher 32 bit address of the input data on which hash has to be calculated
Size of the input data in bytes to be updated
Lower 32 bit address of the output data where hash to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output data where hash to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the sha update/fnish is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Initializes and starts the sha3 engine
copy hash to provided destination address using DMA

briefdescription.para: This function is used for single sha3digest or for multiple sha3 updates based on the First packet bit and Continue bit in the command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the sha Update/Finish/Digest is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Calculate the SHA-3 digest on the given input data
Initiate and complete the DMA to DMA transfer

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If cmd is NULL or if invalid API ID is received.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY - If IPI channel is busy
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Call the API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This file contains the XilSecure SHA3 IPI Handler definition.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kal 03/04/2021 Initial release kpt 05/02/2021 Modified Sha3Kat function and added check to verify whether DMA is already initialized bm 05/13/2021 Updated code to use common crypto instance am 05/22/2021 Resolved MISRA C violation rule 17.8 4.6 har 07/14/2021 Fixed doxygen warnings gm 07/16/2021 Added support for 64-bit address 5.0 kpt 07/24/2022 Moved XSecure_ShaKat into xsecure_kat_plat_ipihandler.c 5.1 yog 05/03/2023 Fixed MISRA C violation of Rule 10.3 vss 07/14/2023 Added support for IpiChannel check 5.2 ng 07/13/2023 Added SDT support vss 09/11/2023 Fixed MISRA-C Rule 8.13 violation vss 09/11/2023 Fixed MISRA-C Rule 10.3 and 10.4 violation 5.3 mb 02/23/2024 Updated HASH length to words in XPlmi_DmaXfr kpt 03/22/2024 Fix MISRA C violation of Rule 10.3 ss 04/05/2024 Fixed doxygen warnings 5.4 yog 04/29/2024 Fixed doxygen grouping and doxygen warnings. pre 03/02/2025 Implemented task based event notification functionality for SHA IPI events 5.6 mb 09/09/2025 Return error code on SHA IPI event handling failure obs 09/23/2025 Added support for Verifying Address Range 5.7 mb 01/28/26 Fixed input buffer address truncation on 64-bit address
